notes: autoresearch_notebook.py defaults (commit b1b6641), real A100 run. Beats the local-harness GPT reference (1.333508 at seq_len=256) and every 3060 DSP-LM run. peak_vram 37.6/40GB -- close to an A100-40GB's limit, has headroom only on an 80GB card.

push 2 (commit aa21cc4), ~110m-scale + checkpointing, run on an 80GB A100 (not the assumed 40GB) -- only 9.97/81.92 GB used. Big win over push 1 (1.144 vs 1.323) but the conservative batch/checkpointing guess cost real throughput (108K tok/sec vs push 1's 344K) for headroom that wasn't needed. Informed push 3's move to the project's own tuned "500m" preset instead of guessing again.
